title: Openclaw
description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
author: openclaw
codeSnippet:
npm install -g openclaw@latest
# or: pnpm add -g openclaw@latest

openclaw onboard --install-daemon
```

title: OpenClaw Docker CN IM
description: OpenClaw 的中国IM平台整合Docker版本，预装并配置了飞书、钉钉、QQ机器人、企业微信等主流中国IM软件的插件，让您可以快速部署一个支持多个中国IM平台的 AI 机器人网关
author: justlovemaki

title: VisionClaw
description: Real-time AI assistant for Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses -- voice + vision + agentic actions via Gemini Live and OpenClaw
author: sseanliu
codeSnippet:
git clone https://github.com/sseanliu/VisionClaw.git
cd VisionClaw/samples/CameraAccess
open CameraAccess.xcodeproj
```

title: Awesome OpenClaw Money Maker
description: 🦞💰 Curated list of ways to make money with OpenClaw - automations, skills, services, and strategies
author: BlockRunAI
codeSnippet:
# Install via OpenClaw
openclaw plugins install @blockrun/clawrouter

# Or via npm
npm install @blockrun/clawrouter@0.11.12

# Or standalone
curl -fsSL https://blockrun.ai/ClawRouter-update | bash
